name: Service Properties Trust
business: Service Properties Trust is a real estate investment trust that owns and leases service-focused retail net lease properties and hotels. As of December 31, 2025, it owned 760 net lease properties and 94 hotels across the United States, Canada, and Puerto Rico. Its income is derived from rents paid by tenants and returns from hotel operations managed by third parties.
sellsTo: net lease tenants (travel centers, quick service restaurants, health and fitness centers, etc.)

exposures.sentence: installed electric car charging stations at some of our hotels and travel centers.

catalysts.event: Expected closing of $745,000 net lease mortgage notes issuance
catalysts.sentence: This transaction is expected to close on or about March 6, 2026.
This redemption is expected to occur on or about March 7, 2026.
